title: Marketing Manager
description:
📢 We Are Hiring: Experienced Marketing Manager (Social Media Focus) 📢

Are you a creative and results-driven marketing professional? Do you have a strong passion for social media marketing and brand growth? If so, we want you on our team!

About the Role

We are looking for an experienced Marketing Managerto lead our marketing efforts, with a strong focus on social media strategy, content creation, and digital engagement. You will play a key role in shaping our brand presence, driving campaigns, and increasing customer engagement.

What You Will Do

✅ Develop and execute social media marketing strategies across platforms (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.)
✅Plan and manage content calendars, ensuring high-quality and engaging posts
✅Analyse performance metrics and optimise campaigns for better reach and conversions
✅Collaborate with influencers, partners, and internal teams to create impactful campaigns
✅Oversee paid social media advertising and budget allocation
✅Stay updated on industry trends and emerging social media technologies

What We Are Looking For

✔️ Minimum 5 years of experience in marketing, with a focus on social media marketing
✔️Strong understanding of social media algorithms, trends, and best practices
✔️Proven track record of growing brand presence and engagement online
✔️Excellent content creation and copywriting skills
✔️Experience with paid ads, analytics tools, and influencer marketing
✔️Creative thinker with a data-driven mindset

Why Join Us?

🌟 Be part of a growing Singapore sanitary ware brand that is redefining modern bathrooms
📈Play a key role in our expansion journey, with opportunities for international growth
💡Work in a fast-paced, innovative environment where your ideas make an impact
📍Based in Singapore, with regional exposure and career growth potential

Join us and take our brand to the next level! 🚀

postedCompany.description:
We are Saniquo, the sole distributor of HERA Bathroom collections in Singapore.

Established in 2010, we have come a long way in ensuring that we provide the finest service made possible with our passion and strength which gives you the convenience and expertise to meet all your bathroom needs under one roof.

 SaniQUO is the sole distributor of HERA Bathroom collections in Singapore.

  • HERA’s collection of Bathroom Furniture are designed in Europe but adapted to Asia’s climate and bathroom sizes using waterproof material, allowing constant contact with water.
  • Our Unique Mini bathtubs series is a “Dream come true” for small bathroom owners who dreams of having a tub.
  • Provide convenience and expertise to help you meet your needs, preferences and budget all under one roof.
  • Global presence in Europe and Asia, providing our clients with end-to-end supply chain solutions in sanitary ware to enable them to achieve their development strategies.
  • Expanded our operations with regional offices in Singapore, China and Myanmar. Our International clients include the biggest players within the construction and building industries in Asia and Europe.
postedCompany.name: SANIQUO PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
